items.title: High-dimensional text classification
items.description: Linear SVMs with sparse TF-IDF or bag-of-words features classify spam, sentiment, and topic labels. Max-margin training handles thousands of dimensions efficiently; support-vector sparsity keeps inference compact.

items.title: Bioinformatics sequence classification
items.description: Kernel SVMs (see Kernels) classify protein or gene sequences when features are similarity-based. Soft margin C handles experimental noise in labels.

items.title: Image patch / object detection scoring
items.description: HOG features + linear SVM historically powered pedestrian detection (e.g., Dalal–Triggs). Margin maximization yields robust linear separators on engineered features.

items.title: Anomaly screening with one-class SVM
items.description: One-class SVM (variant) learns a boundary around normal data in feature space — used for novelty detection when negatives are scarce. Shares max-margin geometry with binary SVM.
